title: July 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 20''' is the 201st day (202nd in leap years) of the year, with 164 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Harrison Ellenshaw]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Carlos Alazraqui]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 5|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 5]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 109|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 109]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]] published.
*2005 – [[Empire 33|''Empire'' 33]] published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]] released for subscribers.
*2005 – [[David Tomblin]] dies.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 3|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 3]] published.
*2011 – ''[[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 2]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Storytime Tin]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 23|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 23]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars (2015) 21|''Star Wars'' (2015) 21]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Mythos]]'' is revealed to be reviving at [[Wikipedia:San Diego Comic-Con|San Diego Comic-Con]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Mazes]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Old Republic Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[The Star Wars Book of Monsters, Ooze and Slime]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Religions of the Force|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Religions of the Force]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 25|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 25]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 4|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 4]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 25|''Star Wars'' (2020) 25]] published.
